title: Right-of-Way Scenario Analysis
summary: Analyze right-of-way scenarios and justify the safest legal action.
studentInstructions: Create a text or Markdown file named right-of-way-analysis.txt or right-of-way-analysis.md.
Write three short scenarios involving intersections, pedestrians, or emergency vehicles.
For each scenario, identify who should yield and why.
Explain the safety principle behind each answer.

rubric.description: Scenarios are realistic and related to right-of-way decisions.
Correctly identifies who should yield in each scenario.
Explains the safety principle behind each decision.
The response is organized and understandable.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Do not require exact legal wording if the reasoning is correct.
Reward answers that prioritize legal, predictable, and conflict-reducing actions.
